name: date-range
title: Date-range picker
description: A from/to date-range field with quick presets (Last 7 days, This month…) over two native date inputs. Baseline is two real <input type="date">s plus preset buttons in a fieldset; date-range.js enforces from ≤ to, applies presets, and emits a normalized range-change event. Locale formatting defers to the platform Intl path. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: DateRange
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the date-range preset — a from/to range field with quick presets. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal date-range.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: data-min
attributes.description: Earliest selectable date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd), mirrored onto both inputs.

attributes.name: data-max
attributes.description: Latest selectable date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd), mirrored onto both inputs.

slots.description: From/to date inputs and the quick-preset buttons.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).

files.content:
Date range
→

The end date can't be before the start date.
